channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260512)
item.description:
What's New

fix(engine): auto-capitalize sentence first char — full audit & fixes

Thorough audit and fixes for the "Tự động viết hoa chữ đầu câu"

feature. Covers 5 independent bugs across VNEngine core and the

XKeyIM Input Method, introduces a DRY invariant to prevent future

regressions, and adds full test coverage.

Core bugs fixed

---------------

  1. updateUpperCaseStatus() reset status to 0 on space, breaking the

period → space → letter capitalize flow. Now preserves pending

status when space is typed.

  1. handleNormalKey() trigger only checked status == 2 (newline) but

never status == 1 (period). Changed to status >= 1 so both "."

and "\n" capitalize the next word.

  1. handleWordBreak() had inline duplicate logic for upperCaseStatus

that was practically dead code (EventHandler and XKeyIMController

both intercept word breaks first). Replaced with delegation to

updateUpperCaseStatus() — single source of truth.

  1. handleWordBreak() used VietnameseData.char(for: keyCode) which

returned nil for KEYENTER/KEYRETURN, incorrectly resetting

status to 0. Pass the already-available character parameter

directly ("\n" for Enter, "." for period, etc.).

  1. processWordBreak() had 3 early-return paths (macro replacement,

macro after restore, spell-check restore success) that skipped

the updateUpperCaseStatus() call. Typing "gm. b" with a macro

"gm → gmail" produced "gmail. b" instead of "gmail. B".

DRY invariant

-------------

Replace 3 scattered updateUpperCaseStatus() calls in processWordBreak

with a single defer { updateUpperCaseStatus(character: character) }

at function entry. Guarantees the status is always updated regardless

of which return path is taken, including future paths.

XKeyIM Input Method (critical bug)

----------------------------------

XKeyIMSettings class was missing the upperCaseFirstChar property.

applySettings() never forwarded it to the engine, so vUpperCaseFirstChar

stayed 0 in XKeyIM mode even though the toggle saved to plist correctly.

Users running XKeyIM as their input method never saw the feature work.

  • Add upperCaseFirstChar property to XKeyIMSettings
  • Read XKey.upperCaseFirstChar from plist in reload()
  • Forward to engine in applySettings()

Also added the missing updateUpperCaseStatus("\n") call in the Enter

handler before engine.resetWithCursorMoved().

State hygiene

-------------

VNEngineSettings.updateSettings() now clears upperCaseStatus when the

feature is toggled off, preventing stale pending status from leaking

into future typing if the user re-enables the feature later.

Feature scope expanded

----------------------

updateUpperCaseStatus() now treats "?" and "!" as sentence-ending

punctuation in addition to ".". Previously only "." triggered

capitalize even though "?" and "!" are semantically equivalent.

Test coverage

-------------

New file XKeyTests/VNEngineAutoCapitalizeTests.swift with 15 tests:

  • Happy paths: . ? ! and \n with/without intervening spaces
  • Negative paths: , space alone, feature disabled
  • State transitions: reset by non-space, only first char caps
  • Regression guards for bugs #5 (macro path) and state-leak

(toggle off then on must not leak pending status)

All 391 tests in the full suite pass. Both XKey main app and XKeyIM

targets build successfully.

Files changed

-------------

XKey/Core/Engine/VNEngine.swift

XKey/Core/Engine/VNEngineSettings.swift

XKeyIM/XKeyIMController.swift

XKeyTests/VNEngineAutoCapitalizeTests.swift (new)

XKey.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
